Reply.name: Dlg_npc_001415
Reply.text: Wait, wait, no need to overreact. Someone tried to contact me on the radio this morning. The voice really sounded like my comrade from Sowth. And now you show up and ask for a gun. Okay, I'll believe you. Imp or Pecheneg?

Reply.name: Dlg_npc_001417
Reply.text: Never heard of these? Surely, you don't see such weapons in these lands. Let me explain. The Imp is a cannon. It's a powerful weapon, but you have to shoot at close range. Pecheneg is a machine gun. Better than yours, but you can't expect it to kill your enemy by one shot. You got to aim it from a distance. So, what are you taking?
